title: Drinkchart Incident Tree Config
description: A versioned, deterministic question tree for incident logging. The app renders any valid config generically; shipping a new tree version is a config push, never an app release. tools/lint-tree.mjs enforces the semantic rules this schema cannot express (spawn-target existence, no cycles, depth <= 3, floor <= 3 per branch, reachability).

tree_version.description: Monotonically increasing. Answers persist with the version they were captured under.

branches.description: One entry per outcome branch plus the live-urge entry mode. floor = the required minimum path; everything else is invited cards (renderer shows max 3, 'more' reveals the rest, every card skippable).

tag_rules.description: Deterministic cross-node tagging (e.g. B4 x O1 -> broke-own-rule). Evaluated in code when the referenced answer or the arc outcome changes; resulting tags persist on the arc.

id.description: Stable forever. Never reuse or repurpose an id across tree versions.

input_type.description: 'tap' extends the spec's implicit entry type (E1/E2). 'chips' renders like single but styled as quick bands.

options.description: Required for single/multi/chips; forbidden for tap/number/text (lint enforces).

required.description: Only floor nodes may be required (lint enforces): depth is invited, never required.

allow_secondary.description: single only. Lets the user add one optional secondary choice (B1: primary driver + optional secondary).

allow_free_text.description: Adds an optional free-text companion field (the spec's 'single+text' / 'multi+text').

card_group.description: Nodes sharing a card_group render on one card (B3A place + B3B company = the spec's B3 'two singles').

value.description: Stable forever; what persists in answers.value. Never repurpose.

requires_text.description: Selecting this option opens a text field (e.g. 'other').

requires_number.description: Selecting this option opens numeric entry (QTY 'exact').

requires_datetime.description: Selecting this option opens a date-time picker (T1 'pick date & time').

spawn_rule.description: Exactly one of then_node | then_branch | then_action (lint enforces). then_branch redirects the arc into another branch's floor + cards (D1 resolution); then_action 'keep_open' leaves the arc open with no further nodes.

if_value.description: An option value of this node, or '*' for any answer.

floor.description: Ordered required minimum. 'Done' is visible the moment the floor is met.

cards.description: Invited, skippable cards per moment, in display order.

entry_chips.description: Quick chips offered immediately on entry (live urge: B2, B3A, B3B), then the app backs off.

if_outcome.description: Optional additional condition on the arc's effective outcome.
